evals.prompt: feat/auth ブランチを main に rebase したんだけど、この下に feat/auth-ui と feat/auth-api の2つの子PRがぶら下がってる。スタック全体を sync してほしい。feat/auth-ui は #42、feat/auth-api は #44。あと auth-ui の下に auth-ui-tests (#43) もある。
evals.expected_output: Should discover 3 downstream branches, build the correct topological order (auth-ui → auth-ui-tests → auth-api), show a plan, cascade rebase each one, push, adjust PR bases, and launch CI watches in background. The report should show all 3 branches with their status.

assertions.name: correct-topological-order
assertions.check: Rebase order is topologically correct: auth-ui before auth-ui-tests

assertions.name: discovery-all-three
assertions.check: All three downstream branches are identified

assertions.name: show-plan-before-rebase
assertions.check: Shows plan and asks for user confirmation

assertions.name: pr-base-adjustment
assertions.check: Checks/adjusts PR base after each rebase

assertions.name: structured-report
assertions.check: Produces structured summary report at end

evals.prompt: stacked PR のメンテしたい。今 feat/payment にいるんだけど、親の feat/checkout が force-push されたっぽい。まず自分を rebase してから、下流の feat/payment-tests (#51) も更新して。CI 落ちたら直して。
evals.expected_output: Should first rebase the current branch (feat/payment) onto its parent (feat/checkout), then discover and rebase the downstream branch (feat/payment-tests). Should handle CI failures top-down.

assertions.name: self-rebase-first
assertions.check: Rebases feat/payment onto feat/checkout BEFORE cascading downstream

assertions.name: no-upstream-recheck
assertions.check: Passed upstream CI not re-checked during downstream fixes

assertions.name: ci-fix-approach
assertions.check: Structured approach to diagnose and fix CI failures

evals.prompt: 3段のスタックで cascade rebase してほしい。main ← refactor/core (#10) ← refactor/api (#11) ← refactor/cli (#12)。refactor/core にいて、さっき main から rebase した。api と cli を順番に sync して、全部の CI が通るか確認して。conflict あったら自動で解決してくれていいよ。
evals.expected_output: Should discover refactor/api and refactor/cli as downstream. Rebase api onto core first, then cli onto api. Auto-resolve conflicts where possible. Push both, adjust PR bases, watch CI for both.

assertions.name: auto-conflict-resolution
assertions.check: Addresses auto-resolving conflicts per user request

assertions.name: rebase-onto-correct-parent
assertions.check: Each branch rebased onto direct parent, not skip-level

assertions.name: ci-watch-all
assertions.check: CI watched for both rebased branches
